title: Secrets, Dependencies, Static Analysis, and Supply Chain
description: Build layered security gates for source, dependencies, workflows, and releases. Learners cumulatively produce a secure-development gate stack through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Prevent, detect, revoke, and remediate committed credentials and sensitive files.
Scan direct and transitive dependencies and triage exploitability and reachability.
Use static security analysis for data flow and dangerous patterns with reviewed queries.
